Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Sharon Huang Bassan To Compel Trustee To Provide Information, And Redress Breach Of Trus
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Continued To Nov-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-18-301644 the Maurice Bassan 2004 Trust; PTR-18-301659 The Maurice Bassan 2004 Trust dated Nov. 3, 2004 and PTR-18-301782 The Maurice Bassan Trust dated 11/3/04.

Appearances: Michael Spalding for and with Lou Ann Bassan.
David Mansour for and with David Bassan.
William Taylor appeared by telephone for and with Sharon Huang Bassan (present).
Kevin Lachona for Troyann Nielsen (Trustee).

The Court informed the Parties that they need to file an ex parte petition to consolidate in all three case numbers. Mr. Mansour raised the issue of appointment of the Parents as Guardian Ad Litem for the Minor stating that there is a conflict. Mr. Spalding ask the Court for a list of Guardian Ad Litems. The Court informed Mr. Spalding that it has no such list and suggested picking an Attorney that the Parties can all agree to. Mr. Mansour stated that discovery is ongoing, that they are meeting and conferring, and suggested setting a trial in November or doing mediation. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of Trust Instrument, etc., Petition of Lou Ann Bassan for a Determination of Beneficial Interests in Trusts, etc. and Petition of Sharon Huang Bassan to Compel Trustee to Provide Information are continued to November 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition Of Sharon Huang Bassan To Compel Trustee To Provide Information, And Redress Breach Of Trus
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Jul-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-18-301644 The Maurice Bassan 2004 Trust; PTR-18-301659 The Maurice Bassan 2004 Trust dated Nov. 2004 and PTR-18-301782 The Maurice Bassan Trust dated November 3, 2004 as Amended and Restated by First Amendment July 10, 2015.

Appearances: William Taylor for Sharon Huang.
Kevin Lachona for Troyann Nilsen.
David Mansour for David Bassan.
Louann Bassan in Propria Persona.

No one objects to the matters being consolidated. Mr. Mansour will file an ex parte petition to consolidate the cases. The Parties addressed the issue of whether or not a Guardian Ad Litem needs to be appointed to protect the interest of the Minors. Mr. Taylor as well as Mr. Mansour expressed that without seeing the earlier Trust document, it is premature to determine whether there is a conflict of representation. Mr. Lachona stated that he does not have to provide the document under the probate code and that he has a signed Court order indicating that he does not have to turn over the 2004 document. Mr. Mansour stated that said order was for a different petition (request for production of documents), and that they have filed a contest. Mr. Lachona stated that he will talk to his Client. Mr. Taylor stated that the real issue is whether the house that the Children and his Client live in should be sold. All Parties waive notice of the Petition of Sharon Huang Bassan to Compel Trustee to Provide Information, etc. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of Trust Instrument, etc., Petition of Lou Ann Bassan for a Determination of Beneficial Interests in Trusts, etc. and Petition of Sharon Huang Bassan to Compel Trustee to Provide Information are continued to July 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to discuss where they want to go from here, whether they want to try mediation and whether the assets could be transferred from the 2003 Trust to the 2004 Trust.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Reporter: Vicki Haines, CSR #5995, 415-676-7416.

Petition Of Sharon Huang Bassan To Compel Trustee To Provide Information, And Redress Breach Of Trus
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Continued To Jun-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
